articles.author: Robert Hart
articles.title: Google ordered to open Android and Search to rivals in Europe - The Verge
articles.description: The EU says Google must let rival search engines and AI assistants have comparable access to Android and some Search data to comply with the DMA.
articles.content: The EU says Google must let rival search engines and AI assistants have comparable access to Android and some Search data to comply with the DMA. The EU says Go… [+5522 chars]

articles.author: Julian Chokkattu
articles.title: OnePlus, the ‘Flagship-Killer’ Smartphone Brand, Is All but Dead - WIRED
articles.description: The original OnePlus phone disrupted the mobile market 13 years ago with its affordable price and top-end specs. Now, the company is exiting North America and Europe to focus on China.
